---
title: "Validation 2 NicheProt workflow"
date: "2025-04-17"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# Load necessary library
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)
library(BioNet)
library(stringr)
library(pcaMethods)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggpubr)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(VIM)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r read in intensity values from n3 sheet, echo = TRUE}

intensity_raw <- read_xlsx("/Users/Suzy/Documents/SP_data_processing/new_valid2/CE3_2024Oct08_05_P24-162_ES1-ES6_Proteins.xlsx", sheet = 1) %>%
  filter(`Protein FDR Confidence: Combined` != "Checked")%>%
  dplyr::select(4:5, 27:32)

colnames(intensity_raw) <- c("Proteins","Description","Control_1","Control_2","Control_3","NicheProt_1","NicheProt_2","NicheProt_3")

# Remove rows where all values are NA
intensity_raw <- intensity_raw %>%
  dplyr::filter(rowSums(!is.na(dplyr::select(., where(is.numeric)))) > 0)

# Remove rows with fewer than 2 non-NA values in each group
intensity_raw <- intensity_raw %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    rowSums(!is.na(dplyr::select(., starts_with("Control_")))) >= 2 &
    rowSums(!is.na(dplyr::select(., starts_with("NicheProt_")))) >= 2
  )


```

```{r gene mapping using uniprot file, echo = TRUE}

uniprot_ids <- read_xlsx("/Users/Suzy/Documents/SP_data_processing/new_valid2/uniprotkb_AND_model_organism_10090_AND_2024_10_07.xlsx")%>%
  dplyr::select(Entry, `Gene Names`)%>%
  dplyr::rename("Proteins"="Entry")

intensity_raw_map <- intensity_raw %>%
  left_join(.,uniprot_ids, by = "Proteins")%>%
  mutate(`Gene Names` = gsub(" .*","",`Gene Names`))%>%
  dplyr::select(Proteins,`Gene Names`,3:8)%>%
  dplyr::rename("Genes"="Gene Names")

intensity_raw_map$Genes <- make.unique(intensity_raw_map$Genes)
  
intensity_raw <- intensity_raw_map
```

```{r data normalization, echo = TRUE}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(vsn)
library(limma)

# Ensure all gene names in the 'Genes' column are unique
numeric_cols <- intensity_raw %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c(Proteins)) %>% 
  mutate(Genes = ifelse(is.na(Genes) | Genes == "", "NA", Genes)) %>% 
  column_to_rownames(var = "Genes") %>%  
  mutate(across(starts_with("Control_") | starts_with("NicheProt_"), as.numeric))  

# Check if numeric conversion was successful
str(numeric_cols)

# Assuming `numeric_data` is your data matrix
vsn_data <- normalizeVSN(as.matrix(numeric_cols))

# Verify fit using meanSdPlot
meanSdPlot(vsn_data)

# Convert to a data frame for ggplot2
normalized_df <- as.data.frame(vsn_data)
```

```{r data imputation, echo = TRUE}
# Impute missing values from a normal distribution
impute_normal <- function(x) {
  missing <- is.na(x)
  n_missing <- sum(missing)
  if (n_missing > 0) {
    imputed_values <- rnorm(n_missing, mean(x, na.rm = TRUE) - 1.8 * sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), 0.3 * sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))
    x[missing] <- imputed_values
  }
  return(x)
}

# Impute zero values
intensity_imputed <- normalized_df %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("Control_") | starts_with("NicheProt_") , impute_normal))

```

PCA plots
```{r pca, echo=TRUE}
# Perform PCA
# Remove Protein_ID column for PCA

library(ggrepel)
pca_data <- intensity_imputed 

# Perform PCA
# Perform PCA on the log-transformed data
pca_results <- pca(t(pca_data), method = "svd")

# Extract PCA scores
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(pca_results))
pca_scores$Sample <- rownames(pca_scores)

# Prepare pheno_dat
pheno_dat <- as.data.frame(rownames(pca_scores)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Sample" = "rownames(pca_scores)") %>%
  mutate(Group = case_when(
    grepl("Control", Sample) ~ "Control",
    grepl("NicheProt", Sample) ~ "NicheProt",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown"
  )) %>%
  left_join(pca_scores, by = "Sample") 



pca_sample <- ggplot(pheno_dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Sample)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "PCA by sample", x = "PC1", y = "PC2") +
  theme_bw()

pca_sample

pca_group <- ggplot(pheno_dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Group)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "PCA by group", x = "PC1", y = "PC2") +
  theme_bw()

pca_group

pca_group <- ggplot(pheno_dat, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  # ADD ggforce's ellipses
  #ggforce::geom_mark_ellipse(aes(color = Group))+
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Sample), size = 3) +
  labs(title = "PCA by group", x = "PC1", y = "PC2") +
  theme_bw()

pca_group

ggsave("pca_group_plot.png", plot = pca_group, width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
knitr::include_graphics("pca_group_plot.png")


```

```{r perform pearson correlationship plot by groups, echo = TRUE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Identify Control and NicheProt columns
control_cols <- grep("^Control_", colnames(intensity_imputed), value = TRUE)
NicheProt_cols <- grep("^NicheProt_", colnames(intensity_imputed), value = TRUE)

# Calculate group-wise average expression per protein
group_means_log2 <- intensity_imputed %>%
  mutate(Control_mean = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., all_of(control_cols)), na.rm = TRUE),
         NicheProt_mean = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., all_of(NicheProt_cols)), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Control_mean, NicheProt_mean) %>%
  mutate(Protein = rownames(intensity_imputed))

# Calculate correlation and n
cor_value <- cor(group_means_log2$Control_mean, group_means_log2$NicheProt_mean, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
n_proteins <- nrow(group_means_log2)

# SCreate plot with annotation
ggplot(group_means_log2, aes(x = Control_mean, y = NicheProt_mean)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Protein Correlation: Control vs. NicheProt (log2-transformed)",
       x = "log2(Average Expression in Control)",
       y = "log2(Average Expression in NicheProt)") +
  annotate("text",
           x = min(group_means_log2$Control_mean) + 1,
           y = max(group_means_log2$NicheProt_mean) - 1,
           label = paste0("n = ", n_proteins, "\nR = ", round(cor_value, 3)),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "italic")

```

```{r perform coefficients of variation plot NicheProt group, echo = TRUE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(viridis)

# Get NicheProt sample columns
NicheProt_cols <- grep("^NicheProt_", colnames(intensity_imputed), value = TRUE)

# Calculate mean and CV for NicheProt samples only
cv_NicheProt_plot <- intensity_imputed %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # Mean expression across NicheProt samples
    mean_log2_NicheProt = mean(c_across(all_of(NicheProt_cols)), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Coefficient of Variation across NicheProt samples
    cv_NicheProt = sd(c_across(all_of(NicheProt_cols)), na.rm = TRUE) / 
                  mean(c_across(all_of(NicheProt_cols)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(mean_log2_NicheProt, cv_NicheProt) %>%
  mutate(Protein = rownames(intensity_imputed))

# Plot with density-colored dots
ggplot(cv_NicheProt_plot, aes(x = mean_log2_NicheProt, y = cv_NicheProt)) +
  geom_pointdensity(adjust = 1) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Point Density", option = "plasma") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "CV vs Mean log2 Intensity in NicheProt Group",
    x = "Mean log2 Intensity (NicheProt)",
    y = "Coefficient of Variation"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11)
  )
```

```{r perform coefficients of variation plot control group, echo = TRUE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(viridis)


# Get Control sample columns
control_cols <- grep("^Control_", colnames(intensity_imputed), value = TRUE)

# Calculate mean and CV for Control samples only
cv_control_plot <- intensity_imputed %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # Mean expression across Control samples
    mean_log2_control = mean(c_across(all_of(control_cols)), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Coefficient of Variation across Control samples
    cv_control = sd(c_across(all_of(control_cols)), na.rm = TRUE) / 
                  mean(c_across(all_of(control_cols)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(mean_log2_control, cv_control) %>%
  mutate(Protein = rownames(intensity_imputed))

# Plot with density-colored dots
ggplot(cv_control_plot, aes(x = mean_log2_control, y = cv_control)) +
  geom_pointdensity(adjust = 1) +
  scale_color_viridis(name = "Point Density", option = "plasma") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "CV vs Mean log2 Intensity in Control Group",
    x = "Mean log2 Intensity (Control)",
    y = "Coefficient of Variation"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11)
  )

```
